items.title: Inference and Missing Data (Rubin, 1976)
items.author: Donald B. Rubin
items.note: Foundational MCAR/MAR/MNAR framework and conditions for ignorable likelihood-based inference.

items.title: Multiple Imputation for Nonresponse in Surveys (Rubin, 1987)
items.author: Donald B. Rubin
items.note: Classic treatment of multiple imputation and propagating uncertainty across imputed datasets.

items.title: scikit-learn — Imputation of missing values
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: SimpleImputer, KNNImputer, and pipeline integration with train-only fit discipline.
